item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.

Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.title: Odin 2 synthesizer for macOS [Audio Apps]
item.itunes:title: Odin 2 synthesizer for macOS [Audio Apps]
item.itunes:author: Markospoko
item.itunes:summary:
Odin 2 synthesizer for macOS
(Audio Apps)
Odin 2 soft synthesizer for macOS recompiled using newer JUCE framework that should run as far as in 10.9.
You probably need a MIDI controller to play on it. This is an independent application, not a plug-in.

Don't be too shy, feel free to give it a try, hesitation isn't good for you when it comes to that type of goodies, trust me, I'm your best advisor :-), there should be no harm in that unless you are a hermit or an orthodox Jew, in which case you probably wouldn't need computer either lol. I believe it's quite easy to download it and to do something with that (well, perhaps relatively, it may depend on the item), after all what have you got to lose? Don't take it incorrectly, I'm simply incenting you to have a go, otherwise you could i.e. wait for unspecified amount of time not knowing and it's good to evaluate it potentially, I don't know why people like something and don't use it BTW or they like it and suddenly they don't like it without a cause, that's peculiar, it's a soft promotion/making that more apparent to ya in order to incent you to take advantage of using it actually yourself, I hope it's not too over you.

[b]DISCLAIMER (it's just a precaution and because of mutual safety I guess)[/b]
This software/resource is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied and such software is to be used at your own risk. While it was created taking many aspects and factors in mind, the use of this software/resource is done at your own discretion and risk and with agreement that you will be solely responsible for any damage to your computer system or loss of data that results from such activities. No advice or information, whether oral or written, obtained by you from us shall create any warranty for the software/resource. Additionally, we make no warranty that: (a) This software/resource will meet your requirements, (b) This software/resource will be uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free, (c) The results from the use of this software/resource will be effective, accurate or reliable, (d) The quality of this software/resource will meet your expectations, (e) If errors or problems occur in connection with a download of this software/resource obtained from the links on this website, they will be corrected.
[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer IMAP Backup tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer IMAP Backup tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer IMAP Backup tool
(Utilities)
With ToolsBaer IMAP Backup Tool, archiving your IMAP emails is a simple and easy process. The application allows users to back up their emails in PST, EML, HTML, PDF, EMLX, and HTML formats, ensuring data storage adaptability. Users can just need to follow the program's instructions to download an IMAP Server mailbox backup to their system. IMAP email backups with attachments take a few minutes if the program runs smoothly. Users can download each IMAP Server folder locally from any location on their computer. The application backs up all folders, including drafts, inbox, Outlook, and any customizable folders. Downloading ToolsBaer IMAP Backup Software on Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, and previous versions is a simple process.
Read More:- http://www.toolsbaer.com/imap-backup/
[read more]

item.title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME SPACE [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME SPACE
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Nubia Red Magic's new Game Space, expertly ported by RevWhiteShadow, offers an unparalleled gaming experience. This innovative feature optimizes your device for gaming, enhancing performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay. It's the ultimate playground for mobile gamers, where you can immerse yourself in your favorite titles with unparalleled speed and precision. Say goodbye to lags and interruptions, as this gaming space takes your mobile gaming to the next level.
Hey there, fellow gamers! Have you heard the exciting news? The Nubia Red Magic's Game Space has been expertly ported for all Android devices, thanks to the amazing work of RevWhiteShadow. If you're a mobile gaming enthusiast like me, this is something you definitely don't want to miss out on!

So, what exactly is the Game Space? Let me break it down for you. This innovative feature is designed to optimize your device specifically for gaming, providing you with an unparalleled gaming experience. It works by enhancing your device's performance, reducing distractions, and ensuring seamless gameplay, all in one convenient space.

Imagine diving into your favorite mobile games without having to worry about lags or interruptions. That's exactly what the Game Space offers. With its expertly ported version, you can enjoy lightning-fast speeds and precision like never before. It's truly the ultimate playground for mobile gamers.

Now, let's address some common questions you might have about the Game Space:

1. What games are compatible with Game Space?
Game Space is compatible with a wide range of mobile games, from popular titles to indie gems. Whether you're into action, adventure, strategy, or racing games, you'll find something to love in the Game Space library.

2. How does Game Space enhance gaming performance?
Game Space optimizes your device's resources to ensure smooth and seamless gameplay. It minimizes background processes, allocates more CPU and GPU power to your games, and prioritizes network connectivity, all of which contribute to an enhanced gaming experience.

3. Can I customize Game Space settings to suit my preferences?
Absolutely! Game Space allows you to customize various settings according to your preferences. You can adjust performance settings, enable or disable notifications, and even create custom profiles for different games.

4. Is Game Space safe to use?
Yes, Game Space is completely safe to use. It's been thoroughly tested and vetted to ensure that it meets the highest standards of security and performance.

So, what are you waiting for? Take your mobile gaming experience to the next level with the Game Space ported for all Android devices. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever gamed without it!
[read more]

item.title: Joingy APK Free Download for Android - latest version [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Joingy APK Free Download for Android - latest version [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
Joingy APK Free Download for Android - latest version
(Various Games)
In today's digital world, connectivity and communication are becoming increasingly vital. With the evolution of mobile technology, connecting with others anytime, anywhere has never been easier. And now, with Joingy APK 1.0.1, the random connection experience is brought right to your fingertips, in the most convenient and engaging manner.
Explore Joingy APK 1.0.1
Joingy is not just your average random connection app. It's a magical bridge, allowing you to meet and chat with new people easily and delightfully. With a user-friendly interface and advanced features, Joingy APK 1.0.1 promises to deliver the best connection experiences on your mobile phone.

item.title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: dim4ugan
item.itunes:summary:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.description:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

item.title: FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 Version Free Download App [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 Version Free Download App [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 Version Free Download App
(Various Games)
Unveiling FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2: Your Comprehensive Guide
In the ever-evolving landscape of digital security, innovation remains the hallmark of progress. Among the myriad solutions surfacing to safeguard our virtual identities, FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 emerges as a beacon of promise, combining cutting-edge facial recognition technology with seamless user experience. As seasoned tech enthusiasts and guardians of cybernetic advancements, we delve into the depths of this revolutionary application to unveil its intricacies and potentials.

Understanding FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2
At its core, FaceCheck ID APK 1.0.2 epitomizes the fusion of convenience and security. Designed to empower users with a frictionless authentication process, this application leverages advanced facial recognition algorithms to ensure swift and reliable identity verification. With a streamlined interface and intuitive controls, it caters to both tech-savvy individuals and those new to digital authentication, making it a versatile tool for a diverse user base.

item.title: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game
(Various Games)
In today's mobile gaming world, Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 has become a household name. With millions of players worldwide, this game has sparked a frenzy with its gacha system, engaging gameplay, and stunning graphics. In this article, we will delve into the details of Gacha Nox APK version 1.3.1, evaluating its standout features and advantages.
Review:

Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 is not just a simple entertainment game; it's a challenging and captivating experience. While maintaining its gacha gameplay, this new version has brought significant updates and improvements, from performance enhancements to the addition of new features.

Standout Features:

Diverse Gacha System: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 continues to uphold a diverse gacha system with hundreds of characters and items to collect. This diversity creates excitement and desire for collecting and upgrading.
Stunning Graphics: With beautiful 2D graphics and special effects, Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 is truly a masterpiece on mobile. Each character and skill is meticulously designed, creating a vibrant and appealing world.
Rich Gameplay Modes: This game not only offers simple gameplay modes but also includes various rich gameplay modes such as PvP battles, PvE, cross-server competitions, and weekly special events.
Regular Updates: The developers of Gacha Nox continuously update and add new content to ensure players never feel bored. Version 1.3.1 has brought many new features and bug fixes, improving the player experience.
Advantages:

[read more]
item.description:
Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 For Android Latest Version Download Game
(Various Games)
In today's mobile gaming world, Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 has become a household name. With millions of players worldwide, this game has sparked a frenzy with its gacha system, engaging gameplay, and stunning graphics. In this article, we will delve into the details of Gacha Nox APK version 1.3.1, evaluating its standout features and advantages.
Review:

Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 is not just a simple entertainment game; it's a challenging and captivating experience. While maintaining its gacha gameplay, this new version has brought significant updates and improvements, from performance enhancements to the addition of new features.

Standout Features:

Diverse Gacha System: Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 continues to uphold a diverse gacha system with hundreds of characters and items to collect. This diversity creates excitement and desire for collecting and upgrading.
Stunning Graphics: With beautiful 2D graphics and special effects, Gacha Nox APK 1.3.1 is truly a masterpiece on mobile. Each character and skill is meticulously designed, creating a vibrant and appealing world.
Rich Gameplay Modes: This game not only offers simple gameplay modes but also includes various rich gameplay modes such as PvP battles, PvE, cross-server competitions, and weekly special events.
Regular Updates: The developers of Gacha Nox continuously update and add new content to ensure players never feel bored. Version 1.3.1 has brought many new features and bug fixes, improving the player experience.
Advantages:

item.title: Undress AI APK 1.1 Download Latest Version For Android [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Undress AI APK 1.1 Download Latest Version For Android [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: ghffdhh8
item.itunes:summary:
Undress AI APK 1.1 Download Latest Version For Android
(Various Games)
Undress App APK 1.1" is a creative entertainment app designed for users on mobile platforms. Leveraging augmented reality and machine learning technology, this app offers a unique experience, allowing users to "undress" or "dress up" virtual layers of clothing on their images.
Key Features:

Undress Virtual Clothing: Users can select photos from their gallery or take new ones and then use this feature to remove virtual layers of clothing on the image, creating an impression similar to real undressing.
Add Virtual Clothing: In addition to undressing, users can also add virtual layers of clothing to their images from a diverse collection, ranging from sportswear to elaborate costumes.
Customization: The app provides graphic editing tools for users to customize and adjust virtual clothing to fit their body shape and position on the image.
Sharing and Storage: Users can share edited photos on social media platforms or directly store them on their mobile devices.
[read more]
